text: Smart Payments is super slick. Setup took 2 minutes and my first transaction went through instantly.
Really clean UI for the new payment flow. Much better than the old checkout process.
Finally! One-tap payments work perfectly on my end. Great update.
Payment setup was fine but the confirmation screen took a while to load. Not a dealbreaker.
Loving the new feature. Had one transaction pending for a bit but resolved itself.
My payment failed twice before going through on the third try. This is really frustrating.
App feels a little slower since the update. Nothing broken though, just noticeable.
Payment failed and I was charged anyway. Raised a support ticket but no response yet. Very unhappy.
The app crashed right after I submitted my payment. Don't know if it went through or not. Scary.
Three failed transactions today. This is unacceptable for a payments feature. Rolling back to manual.
Works great for me. Fast and easy to use.
Tried to complete the payment setup 3 times. Keeps timing out at the last step.
Payment failure with no error message. Money deducted but order not placed. This is a serious bug.
App crashes whenever I try to use Smart Payments on my Android. Reverted to old method.
Mixed experience. Works sometimes, fails others. Seems inconsistent depending on time of day.
No issues here. The feature is fast and the UI is really intuitive.
Submitted a support ticket 2 days ago about payment failure. Still no resolution. Terrible support.
This is the fourth time my payment has failed this week. I'm considering cancelling my subscription.
API seems overloaded. Every action takes forever. Not usable in this state.
Duplicate charge on my account after a payment failure. This is a financial issue, not just a bug.
Feature works but I've noticed the app is much slower than it was last week.
Still enjoying Smart Payments. Had one slow load but overall positive experience.
Crashed on payment submission again. This has happened 3 times now. Absolutely unacceptable.
I've stopped using Smart Payments entirely. Too unreliable. Please fix this.
Support ticket still unresolved after 4 days. Payment failure is costing me real money.
Best payment experience I've had on any app. Seamless from start to finish.
It's okay. Not as smooth as advertised but nothing catastrophic on my end.
Considering legal action for the duplicate charge. This is unacceptable and I want a refund immediately.
The feature is clearly not ready. Payments fail, app crashes, support is overwhelmed. Roll it back.
Lost trust in this platform after multiple payment failures and a duplicate charge. Cancelling today.
